title: The Gift Settling, Becoming Yours
subtitle: A visualisation for allowing inherited or gifted money to feel fully owned
excerpt: A short visualisation for the period after receiving money you didn't earn. Guides through a simple image: the money as a physical object settling into its place in your life, losing the sense of being borrowed or temporary.

practice.whenToUse: Use when you've received money you didn't earn and it still feels temporary or provisional — like it might be taken back, or like you don't have full permission to use it.

content.text: A five-minute visualisation for after money arrives that wasn't earned in the usual way. The purpose is to let the money become yours in the body, not just on paper — to settle the sense that it might still be claimed back.
Sit comfortably. Close your eyes or soften your gaze at the floor.
Picture the money as a physical object: a parcel, a container, a box, sitting in front of you. It arrived from elsewhere. It is real. It is here.
Notice any sense that it doesn't quite belong to you yet. That it might need to be returned, or redistributed, or justified. Don't argue with that sense. Just notice it.
Now watch the object move slowly into your space, without drama. Into the shelf or drawer or corner of your life where your own things sit. It sets down there without a sound.
It is now in the same category as the other things you own. Your books, your coat, your kitchen table. You didn't build those from scratch either. They are still yours.
Sit with the image for two or three minutes. No action required. The money is in its place. Let it settle.
